summary: A Go-based monolithic CLI tool featuring a test runner, schema validation, webhook reporting, and emerging MCP/observer capabilities.
concerns: High volume of 'extra tests' directories suggests fragmented or generated test suites
Uncommitted changes (2 modified, 1 staged) in a recently released version (v0.22.0)
Potential test maintenance burden due to scattered test locations across GOrchestra agent directories
suggestions: Consolidate the numerous 'extra-tests' agent directories into the main test suite to reduce duplication
Commit or revert the staged and modified files to maintain a clean state post-release
Focus on the new MCP handlers and observer foundation types as they represent the active development trajectory
